home.tagline: A portal for the parliaments of Switzerland and Liechtenstein.

votings.hint: Searches the voting title and the title of the affiliated affair.

affairs.hint: Searches the affair title and the affair number.

speeches.hint: Searches the wording of the speeches.

bodies.hint: Searches the name of a country, canton, city or town.

groups.hint: Searches name, abbreviation and description of committees and parliamentary groups.

texts.hint: Searches the text type and the wording.

documents.hint: Searches the document name and category.

interests.hint: Searches organization name, function and parliamentary group.

home.start_link: Quick links to the federal chambers, cantons and communal parliaments

metas.home.title: Swiss & Liechtenstein parliamentary data
metas.home.desc: Browse the parliaments of Switzerland and Liechtenstein: members, votes, speeches, lobbying ties and more. Non-profit, open source.
